title: Fitted-sheet retention arrangement
abstract: The present invention provides a bedding system where a band is placed along the periphery of a mattress, the band including regions of one of a hook or loop type fastener. A sheet with the corresponding hook or loop fastener covers the mattress, and the corresponding fastener on the sheet contacts the band at the region, such that the sheet attaches to the band.
claims:
Claims 1. A fitted sheet for use with a mattress having a top surface and a periphery including four peripheral edges and four corners, the mattress having hook-type fasteners of a hook-and- loop fastening configuration facing outwards at the corners, the fitted sheet comprising: a. a central region for covering the top surface of the mattress; b. a fitted skirt contiguous with said central region, said fitted skirt having four corner portions and being shaped for fitting closely around the periphery of the mattress; c. at least one strip of loop-type fasteners integrated with each of said corner portions and extending along at least a third of a height of said fitted skirt. 2. The fitted sheet of claim 1, wherein lower edges of said fitted skirt are convexly curved so that a center region of each edge of said fitted skirt bulges outward relative to a straight line between said corner portions by between 3 cm and 8 cm. 3. The fitted sheet of claim 1, wherein a lower edge of said fitted skirt includes an elastic tensioning element deployed adjacent to at least two of said corner portions, while leaving a majority of each of at least two long edges of said sheet without elastic. 4. The fitted sheet of claim 1, wherein said strip of loop-type fasteners integrated with each of said corner portions extends along a majority of a height of said fitted skirt. 5. The fitted sheet of claim 1, wherein said strip of loop-type fasteners integrated with each of said corner portions extends along an entirety of a height of said fitted skirt. 6. A bedding system comprising: a. the fitted sheet of any preceding claim; b. a mattress having a top surface and a periphery including four peripheral edges and four corners; c. a strip of hook-type fasteners of a hook-and-loop fastening configuration extending around each of said corners of said mattress. 7. The bedding system of claim 6, wherein each of said strips of hook-type fasteners has a major dimension extending horizontally around said corner of said mattress and a minor dimension, smaller than said major dimension, extending vertically. 8. The bedding system of claim 6, wherein said strips of hook-type fasteners are supported on a removable band extending around the periphery of the mattress. 9. The bedding system of claim 8, wherein said removable band is further provided with a pair of strips traversing each of said corners of said mattress diagonally, one above and one below said mattress. 10. The bedding system of claim 8, wherein said removable band includes two adjustable regions for adjustment of a length of said removable band to fit at least two different sizes of mattress. 11. The bedding system of claim 8, wherein said removable band includes a first long side and a second long side extending along opposite sides of said mattress, and wherein said removable band further comprises a retaining strip passing beneath said mattress between said first long side and said second long side. 12. The bedding system of claim 6, wherein each of said strips of hook-type fasteners is integrated with said mattress, and further comprising a flap of material selectively deployable to cover each of said strips of hook-type fasteners. 13. An adaptor for adapting a mattress for use in a bedding system for anchoring fitted sheets provided with corner strips of loop-fasteners of a hook-and-loop fastener configuration, the adaptor comprising: a. a removable band configured to extend around the periphery of the mattress, said removable band having corner regions for alignment with corners of the mattress; b. a pair of strips attached to said removable band and deployed for traversing each corner of the mattress diagonally, one above and one below the mattress; and 

 c. at least one strip of hook-type fasteners attached to each of said corner regions. 14. The bedding system of claim 13, wherein said removable band includes two adjustable regions for adjustment of a length of said removable band to fit at least two different sizes of mattress. 15. The bedding system of claim 13, wherein said removable band includes a first long side and a second long side extending along opposite sides of said mattress, and wherein said removable band further comprises a retaining strip passing beneath said mattress between said first long side and said second long side. 16. A bed set for use with a mattress having a top surface and a periphery including four peripheral edges and four corners, the bed set comprising: a band configured to extend around the periphery of the mattress, the band including anchoring regions located on said band so as to align with the corners of the mattress, each of said anchoring regions providing a first part of a hook-and-loop fastener; at least one sheet configured for placement on said mattress, said at least one sheet comprising a central region for covering the top surface of the mattress and a fitted skirt having four corner portions and shaped for fitting closely around the periphery of the mattress, said sheet being provided with fastening regions associated with said four corner portions, each of said fastening regions having a complementary part of a hook-and-loop fastener for fastening to said anchoring regions. 17. The bed set of claim 16, wherein said first part of a hook-and-loop fastener in said anchoring regions is a loop fastener and said complementary part of a hook-and-loop fastener is a hook fastener, said sheet being further provided with supplementary regions of a loop fastener located so as to allow closure against said hook fastener when the sheet is removed from the mattress. 18. The bed set of claim 16, wherein said first part of a hook-and-loop fastener in said anchoring regions is a hook fastener and said complementary part of a hook-and-loop fastener is a loop fastener. 19. The bed set of claim 16, wherein at least one corner of said at least one sheet includes an integrated tensioning element fixed to said sheet for enhancing a fit of said sheet on the mattress. 20. The bed set of claim 16, wherein said band includes a pair of strips at each of said corners configured for traversing corners of the mattress diagonally so as to maintain a position of said band on the mattress. 21. The bed set of claim 16, wherein outer edges of said at least one sheet are formed with a convex curvature.
